title: Havok
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the Imperial ship|the Sith Lord [[Darth Havok]]}}
'''''Havok''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]]. ''Havok,'' along with her sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Riptide]]'' attempted to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during negotiations with the [[Habassa]] delegates. ''Havok'' and ''Riptide'' were destroyed on that attempt by combined efforts of the ''[[Birkby]]'' group of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] and Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Havok'' appears in a mission during the [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing|expansion]] to the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
